Bookmark this to keep an eye on my project updates!

View the Project on GitHub r4j2k/r4j2k.github.io

dev documentation for r4j2k.github.io

create GemFile and input gem 'github-pages', group: :jekyll_plugins

gem update bundler
bundle install

start building our jekyll site

jekyll build

or

jekyll serve
